caption: A man wearing a grey suit jacket, a white dress shirt, and a blue patterned tie speaks while standing behind a podium. He wears a thin headset microphone that extends across his cheek. In the background, a white wall features the hashtag "#BigDataSV" and the year "2015" repeated twice. A blue geometric cube logo is visible on the left side of the screen. A grey laptop is positioned in front of him on the podium. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, facing toward the left of the frame. He maintains a serious expression, with slight variations in his facial muscles and gaze as he speaks, while his posture and the surrounding environment remain static.
